hero.title: CARPATHIAN.CONF 2026
hero.tagline: Three days of conversations about design, engineering, and community — in the mountains, without the noise.

cfp.title: Submit a talk
cfp.intro: We accept proposals until 1 March 2026. This is a demo form — nothing is stored or sent.

abstract.label: Abstract (50–1000 characters)
abstract.placeholder: A short pitch — what, for whom, and why now.

success.title: Thanks! We've got your proposal.
success.body: This is a demo — nothing was actually sent. You're welcome to submit another.

abstract.min: The abstract must be at least 50 characters
abstract.max: The abstract must be at most 1000 characters

speakerPreview.title: Six faces of the programme
speakerPreview.intro: The first confirmed names. The full line-up lives on the speakers page.

sponsorStrip.title: Thanks to those standing with us
sponsorStrip.intro: Independent studios, co-ops, and small publishers who make this conference possible.

whatToExpect.title: Three days, three tracks, one valley

tracks.title: Design, Engineering, Community
tracks.body: Three parallel tracks in three rooms. Each day has its own theme and its own register.

format.title: Short talks, long conversations
format.body: 30 minutes on stage, 90 minutes in the foyer. Fewer slides, more exchange.

community.title: Deliberately small
community.body: 350 attendees, shared meals, walks up to the polonyna. Everything built so people actually meet.
